option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" android:maxSdkVersion="32" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@drawable/logo2" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@drawable/logo2" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.SanzinKstore">
<activity android:name=".LoginActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:launchMode="singleTask"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.BROWSABLE" /> <data android:scheme="sanzinkstore" android:host="payment_return" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".AdminProductActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".InventoryActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".LogsActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ProfileActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".SettingsActivity" android:exported="false" />
<service android:name=".service.MyFirebaseMessagingService" android:exported="false"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="com.google.firebase.MESSAGING_EVENT" /> </intent-filter> </service>
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools">
<uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" android:maxSdkVersion="32" /> <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_IMAGES" />
<application android:allowBackup="true" android:dataExtractionRules="@xml/data_extraction_rules" android:fullBackupContent="@xml/backup_rules" android:icon="@drawable/logo2" android:label="@string/app_name" android:roundIcon="@drawable/logo2" android:supportsRtl="true" android:theme="@style/Theme.SanzinKstore">
<activity android:name=".LoginActivity" android:exported="true"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".MainActivity" android:exported="true" android:launchMode="singleTask"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="android.intent.action.VIEW" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" /> <category android:name="android.intent.category.BROWSABLE" /> <data android:scheme="sanzinkstore" android:host="payment_return" /> </intent-filter> </activity>
<activity android:name=".AdminProductActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".InventoryActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".LogsActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ProfileActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".SettingsActivity" android:exported="false" />
<activity android:name=".ChatActivity" android:exported="false" android:windowSoftInputMode="adjustResize" />
<activity android:name=".SellerInboxActivity" android:exported="false" />
<service android:name=".service.MyFirebaseMessagingService" android:exported="false"> <intent-filter> <action android:name="com.google.firebase.MESSAGING_EVENT" /> </intent-filter> </service>
</application>
</manifest>

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="#555555" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="@color/msg_input_bg" /> <corners android:radius="24dp" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="@color/msg_received_bg" /> <corners android:topLeftRadius="18dp" android:topRightRadius="18dp" android:bottomLeftRadius="4dp" android:bottomRightRadius="18dp" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="rectangle"> <solid android:color="@color/msg_sent_bg" /> <corners android:topLeftRadius="18dp" android:topRightRadius="18dp" android:bottomLeftRadius="18dp" android:bottomRightRadius="4dp" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="#2979FF" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="#2979FF" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <shape xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:shape="oval"> <solid android:color="#FF4444" /> </shape>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize" android:background="?attr/colorPrimary" android:theme="@style/ThemeOverlay.AppCompat.Dark.ActionBar" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvMessages" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:clipToPadding="false" android:padding="8dp" android:scrollbars="vertical" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="8dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:background="?attr/colorSurface">
<EditText android:id="@+id/etMessage" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:hint="Message" android:background="@drawable/bg_message_input" android:padding="10dp" android:maxLines="4" android:inputType="textMultiLine|textCapSentences" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnSurface" android:textColorHint="@color/msg_time_text" android:textSize="15sp" />
<ImageButton android:id="@+id/btnSend" android:layout_width="44dp" android:layout_height="44dp" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_send" android:background="@drawable/bg_send_button" android:contentDescription="Send" />
</LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical">
<androidx.appcompat.widget.Toolbar android:id="@+id/toolbar" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="?attr/actionBarSize" android:background="?attr/colorPrimary" android:theme="@style/ThemeOverlay.AppCompat.Dark.ActionBar" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTotalUnread" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:padding="12dp" android:text="" android:textColor="@android:color/darker_gray" android:textSize="14sp" />
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="@android:color/darker_gray" />
<androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rvConversations" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingBottom="8dp" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:padding="12dp" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<!-- Unread dot --> <View android:id="@+id/viewUnreadDot" android:layout_width="8dp" android:layout_height="8dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_unread_dot" android:visibility="invisible" />
<!-- Avatar --> <ImageView android:layout_width="48dp" android:layout_height="48dp" android:layout_marginEnd="12dp" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_menu_myplaces" android:background="@drawable/bg_avatar" android:padding="8dp" android:contentDescription="Avatar" />
<!-- Text block --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvConversationName" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Customer Name" android:textStyle="bold" android:textSize="16sp" android:textColor="?attr/colorOnBackground" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvConversationTime" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Today" android:textColor="@android:color/darker_gray" android:textSize="12sp" />
</LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvLastMessage" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Last message preview..." android:textColor="@android:color/darker_gray" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end" android:textSize="13sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvUnreadCount" android:layout_width="20dp" android:layout_height="20dp" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_unread_badge" android:gravity="center" android:text="1" android:textColor="@android:color/white" android:textSize="11sp" android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="start" android:padding="4dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMessageReceived" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="64dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_message_received" android:padding="10dp" android:text="Message" android:textColor="@color/msg_received_text" android:textSize="15sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTimeReceived" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:text="10:00 AM" android:textColor="@color/msg_time_text" android:textSize="11sp" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:gravity="end" android:padding="4dp" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvMessageSent" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="64dp" android:background="@drawable/bg_message_sent" android:padding="10dp" android:text="Message" android:textColor="@color/msg_sent_text" android:textSize="15sp" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/tvTimeSent" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:text="10:00 AM" android:textColor="@color/msg_time_text" android:textSize="11sp" /> </LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Matte Black & Super White Grey Theme (Night Mode) --> <color name="primary">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="on_primary">#121212</color> <color name="primary_container">#333333</color> <color name="on_primary_container">#E0E0E0</color>
<color name="secondary">#BDBDBD</color> <color name="on_secondary">#121212</color> <color name="secondary_container">#424242</color> <color name="on_secondary_container">#E0E0E0</color>
<color name="background">#121212</color> <color name="on_background">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="surface">#121212</color> <color name="on_surface">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="surface_variant">#212121</color> <color name="on_surface_variant">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="outline">#E0E0E0</color>
<color name="error">#CF6679</color> <color name="on_error">#000000</color> <color name="success">#81C784</color>
<!-- Core Colors --> <color name="matte_black">#121212</color> <color name="super_white_grey">#E0E0E0</color>
<!-- Legacy aliases --> <color name="black">#121212</color> <color name="white">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="neon_pink">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="text_secondary">#BDBDBD</color>
<!-- Category Colors (Muted Dark Monochrome) --> <color name="cat_milktea">#212121</color> <color name="cat_fruit_soda">#333333</color> <color name="cat_food">#424242</color> <color name="cat_snacks">#484848</color> <color name="cat_deals">#525252</color> <color name="cat_default">#616161</color> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Matte Black & Super White Grey Theme (Night Mode) --> <color name="primary">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="on_primary">#121212</color> <color name="primary_container">#333333</color> <color name="on_primary_container">#E0E0E0</color>
<color name="secondary">#BDBDBD</color> <color name="on_secondary">#121212</color> <color name="secondary_container">#424242</color> <color name="on_secondary_container">#E0E0E0</color>
<color name="background">#121212</color> <color name="on_background">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="surface">#121212</color> <color name="on_surface">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="surface_variant">#212121</color> <color name="on_surface_variant">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="outline">#E0E0E0</color>
<color name="error">#CF6679</color> <color name="on_error">#000000</color> <color name="success">#81C784</color>
<!-- Core Colors --> <color name="matte_black">#121212</color> <color name="super_white_grey">#E0E0E0</color>
<!-- Legacy aliases --> <color name="black">#121212</color> <color name="white">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="neon_pink">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="text_secondary">#BDBDBD</color>
<!-- Category Colors (Muted Dark Monochrome) --> <color name="cat_milktea">#212121</color> <color name="cat_fruit_soda">#333333</color> <color name="cat_food">#424242</color> <color name="cat_snacks">#484848</color> <color name="cat_deals">#525252</color> <color name="cat_default">#616161</color>
<!-- Messaging colors (Night mode) --> <color name="msg_sent_bg">#2979FF</color> <color name="msg_sent_text">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="msg_received_bg">#2D2D2D</color> <color name="msg_received_text">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="msg_input_bg">#1E1E1E</color> <color name="msg_time_text">#BDBDBD</color> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Soft Rose Palette (Light Mode) --> <!-- Based on provided image: #D14D72, #FFABAB, #FCC8D1, #FEF2F4 -->
<color name="primary">#D14D72</color> <!-- Rose --> <color name="on_primary">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="primary_container">#FFABAB</color> <!-- Peach --> <color name="on_primary_container">#D14D72</color>
<color name="secondary">#FCC8D1</color> <!-- Light Pink --> <color name="on_secondary">#121212</color> <color name="secondary_container">#FEF2F4</color> <!-- Off-white Pink --> <color name="on_secondary_container">#D14D72</color>
<color name="background">#FEF2F4</color> <!-- Off-white Pink --> <color name="on_background">#121212</color> <color name="surface">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="on_surface">#121212</color> <color name="surface_variant">#FCC8D1</color> <color name="on_surface_variant">#D14D72</color>
<color name="outline">#D14D72</color> <color name="outline_variant">#FFABAB</color>
<!-- Status Colors --> <color name="error">#B00020</color> <color name="on_error">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="success">#2E7D32</color> <color name="on_success">#FFFFFF</color>
<!-- Core Palette Aliases --> <color name="rose_primary">#D14D72</color> <color name="peach_accent">#FFABAB</color> <color name="soft_pink">#FCC8D1</color> <color name="mist_white">#FEF2F4</color>
<!-- Category Muted Palette (Based on Rose Theme) --> <color name="cat_milktea">#FFABAB</color> <color name="cat_fruit_soda">#FCC8D1</color> <color name="cat_food">#FADADD</color> <color name="cat_snacks">#F8C3CD</color> <color name="cat_deals">#E75480</color> <color name="cat_default">#D14D72</color>
<!-- Legacy support --> <color name="white">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="black">#121212</color> <color name="neon_pink">#D14D72</color> <color name="text_secondary">#757575</color> <color name="matte_black">#121212</color> <color name="super_white_grey">#E0E0E0</color> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <resources> <!-- Soft Rose Palette (Light Mode) --> <!-- Based on provided image: #D14D72, #FFABAB, #FCC8D1, #FEF2F4 -->
<color name="primary">#D14D72</color> <!-- Rose --> <color name="on_primary">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="primary_container">#FFABAB</color> <!-- Peach --> <color name="on_primary_container">#D14D72</color>
<color name="secondary">#FCC8D1</color> <!-- Light Pink --> <color name="on_secondary">#121212</color> <color name="secondary_container">#FEF2F4</color> <!-- Off-white Pink --> <color name="on_secondary_container">#D14D72</color>
<color name="background">#FEF2F4</color> <!-- Off-white Pink --> <color name="on_background">#121212</color> <color name="surface">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="on_surface">#121212</color> <color name="surface_variant">#FCC8D1</color> <color name="on_surface_variant">#D14D72</color>
<color name="outline">#D14D72</color> <color name="outline_variant">#FFABAB</color>
<!-- Status Colors --> <color name="error">#B00020</color> <color name="on_error">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="success">#2E7D32</color> <color name="on_success">#FFFFFF</color>
<!-- Core Palette Aliases --> <color name="rose_primary">#D14D72</color> <color name="peach_accent">#FFABAB</color> <color name="soft_pink">#FCC8D1</color> <color name="mist_white">#FEF2F4</color>
<!-- Category Muted Palette (Based on Rose Theme) --> <color name="cat_milktea">#FFABAB</color> <color name="cat_fruit_soda">#FCC8D1</color> <color name="cat_food">#FADADD</color> <color name="cat_snacks">#F8C3CD</color> <color name="cat_deals">#E75480</color> <color name="cat_default">#D14D72</color>
<!-- Legacy support --> <color name="white">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="black">#121212</color> <color name="neon_pink">#D14D72</color> <color name="text_secondary">#757575</color> <color name="matte_black">#121212</color> <color name="super_white_grey">#E0E0E0</color>
<!-- Messaging colors (Light mode) --> <color name="msg_sent_bg">#2979FF</color> <color name="msg_sent_text">#FFFFFF</color> <color name="msg_received_bg">#E0E0E0</color> <color name="msg_received_text">#121212</color> <color name="msg_input_bg">#F0F0F0</color> <color name="msg_time_text">#757575</color> </resources>

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value: ## This file must *NOT* be checked into Version Control Systems, # as it contains information specific to your local configuration. # # Location of the SDK. This is only used by Gradle. # For customization when using a Version Control System, please read the # header note. #Wed Apr 08 08:23:10 CST 2026 sdk.dir=C\:\\Users\\Irijah Maxim\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
## This file must *NOT* be checked into Version Control Systems, # as it contains information specific to your local configuration. # # Location of the SDK. This is only used by Gradle. # For customization when using a Version Control System, please read the # header note. #Wed Apr 08 08:23:10 CST 2026 sdk.dir=C\:\\Users\\Irijah Maxim\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk
# Cloudinary (client-safe values only — API secret must NEVER go here or in code) CLOUDINARY_CLOUD_NAME=dk4zjc9pm CLOUDINARY_API_KEY=533967197894245 # Create an unsigned upload preset in Cloudinary dashboard and paste the name below CLOUDINARY_UPLOAD_PRESET=your_unsigned_preset_name
